seoTitle: Ferny Grove vs Ferny Hills — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ferny Grove and Ferny Hills. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Ferny Grove vs Ferny Hills: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ferny Grove and Ferny Hills.
heading: Ferny Grove vs Ferny Hills — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ferny Grove, Queensland and Ferny Hills, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ferny Hills has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Ferny Grove (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ferny Grove or Ferny Hills safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ferny Grove has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Ferny Hills scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ferny Grove scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Ferny Hills scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ferny Grove or Ferny Hills?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ferny Hills has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.82% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
